Newcastle's Business Community

Newcastle First Business Networking

Connect with Newcastle's business community at our relaxed, informal networking event. Grow your network, share ideas, and put Newcastle first!

Book Your Ticket Subscribe to Newsletter
Welcome

Welcome to Newcastle First

This is a relaxed, informal gathering for local business leaders who want to put Newcastle first, share ideas, and explore new opportunities for collaboration. Whether you're looking to grow your network, spark partnerships, or simply stay in the loop with fellow innovators, this event is the place to be.

All business sectors welcome — just bring your curiosity and community spirit!

✓  100% Free to Attend
No Barriers. No Fees.

Just Community.

We believe the best business connections shouldn't come with a price tag. Newcastle First events are completely free to attend — one of very few free networking events across the entire North East region.

By removing the barriers to entry, we're opening the door for young entrepreneurs just getting started and experienced business leaders alike. Everyone deserves a seat at the table.

Our networking events will vary — some traditional networking, others more creative: think watching local football or rugby together, a game of padel or tennis, bowling, and plenty more. The one thing we're committed to is a free, no-hassle monthly coffee morning — with venues rotating each month to support as many local Newcastle businesses as possible.

☕ Just a heads-up: While our events are free, we do ask that everyone pays for their own coffee. It's our little way of supporting the brilliant local venues who host us.
🤝
Traditional Networking
Classic meet-and-greet sessions to build genuine connections across all business sectors.
⚽
Social Events
Football, rugby, padel, bowling and more — the best connections happen naturally.
☕
Monthly Coffee Mornings
Free monthly gatherings in rotating Newcastle venues, supporting local businesses.
More Than Networking

Our Social Value

Newcastle First isn't just about business cards and handshakes. We're here to create real, lasting social value for our community.

01 💡

Inspiring Stories

We'll be introducing guests with inspiring stories — real people doing great work in our region, sharing their journeys to motivate and energise the room.

02 🌱

Great Ideas Deserve Support

You don't need a business degree to have a brilliant idea. We're here to help those with passion and vision prosper — even if they're just getting started.

03 🏆

Celebrating Community Heroes

Through our High Street Heroes Awards, we'll be shining a spotlight on the unsung heroes making a real difference on our high streets and in our communities.

04 🤝

Coaches & Connections

We'll be making introductions to business coaches and likeminded individuals — connecting you with the right people to take your ideas to the next level.

Ready to Join Us?

Secure your free spot at the next Newcastle First networking event. Meet local business leaders, share ideas, and help shape the future of our business community.

Book Your Free Ticket
Why Newcastle?

Why Newcastle?

Newcastle is the beating heart of the North East — home to world-class universities, a thriving tech and creative sector, and a business community full of ambition. With major investment in city infrastructure and the ongoing regeneration of the Quayside and city centre, Newcastle has never been better positioned for business.

The opportunity is enormous. And we believe Newcastle is ready to become the powerhouse of business networking and connections across the entire North East region.

Our Mission

Building a community that generates real opportunity

We're building a business community that is first and foremost supportive — and in turn becomes progressive and generative. Generating sales, generating income, and generating real opportunities for businesses across the region.

Newcastle First is just the beginning

Bridging ambition & experience

We want to connect emerging young entrepreneurs with established, experienced business leaders — bridging the gap and creating a network where everyone grows together.

Alongside our networking events, we're launching three pillars that will form the lifeblood of what we're building — and expanding across the North East.

Together, these three pillars will empower Newcastle

…to fulfil its potential as the first place you come to do business in the North East.

🤝

Networking

Free monthly coffee mornings and varied events in rotating Newcastle venues — building community, one connection at a time.

● Live Now
🏆

Awards

The North East High Street Heroes Awards — recognising and celebrating the businesses that make our high streets thrive.

● Coming Soon
🎙️

Podcast

A regional podcast spotlighting the stories, insights, and voices driving business forward across the North East.

● In Production
Explore Our Projects

Stay in the Loop

Subscribe to our newsletter for event updates, venue announcements, and the latest from Newcastle's business community.

Home About Events Projects Resources Contact Book Free Ticket

About Newcastle First

A free, community-driven business networking movement built on one simple idea — the best connections shouldn't come with a price tag.

Who We Are

A community built on real connection

Newcastle First is a relaxed, informal gathering for local business leaders who want to put Newcastle first, share ideas, and explore new opportunities for collaboration.

Whether you're looking to grow your network, spark partnerships, or simply stay in the loop with fellow innovators — this is the place to be. All business sectors welcome. Just bring your curiosity and community spirit.

We are one of very few completely free networking events across the entire North East region. By removing the barriers to entry, we open the door to young entrepreneurs just getting started and experienced business leaders alike.

✓  100% Free to Attend — no membership fees, no hidden costs, no long-term commitments.

Our Values

What drives us

🤝 Community First

We put the people of Newcastle and the North East at the heart of everything we do. Real relationships over transactions.

🚪 No Barriers

Everyone deserves a seat at the table. We remove financial and social barriers so anyone can connect and grow.

💡 Real Social Value

We're not just about business cards. We generate genuine social value — inspiring stories, practical support, and lasting impact.

🌱 Growth for All

From first-time founders to seasoned CEOs — we bridge the gap between ambition and experience so everyone grows together.

Why Newcastle?

The beating heart of the North East

Newcastle is home to world-class universities, a thriving tech and creative sector, and a business community full of ambition. With major investment in city infrastructure and the ongoing regeneration of the Quayside, Newcastle has never been better positioned for business.

🎓

World-Class Universities

Newcastle and Northumbria Universities produce thousands of graduates and research breakthroughs annually.

💻

Thriving Tech & Creative Sector

A growing hub for digital, creative, and tech businesses — attracting investment from across the UK and beyond.

🏗️

Major City Investment

Quayside regeneration, transport upgrades, and major commercial developments are transforming Newcastle's business landscape.

Our Mission

Building a community that generates real opportunity

We're building a business community that is first and foremost supportive — and in turn becomes progressive and generative.

Generating sales, generating income, and generating real opportunities for businesses across the region. We want to connect emerging young entrepreneurs with established, experienced business leaders — bridging the gap and creating a network where everyone grows together.

See Our Projects
The Team Behind Newcastle First

Proudly independent

Newcastle First is run by local people who care deeply about this city and its business community. We're not a faceless corporation — we're your neighbours, your collaborators, your fellow North Easterners.

We believe Darlington First, Newcastle First and the wider First Connections network can help the North East punch above its weight on the national stage — starting with the grassroots, one coffee morning at a time.

☕ Just a heads-up: While our events are free, we ask everyone to pay for their own coffee. It's our way of supporting the brilliant local venues who host us.

Ready to be part of it?

Join us at the next Newcastle First event — free, relaxed, and full of genuine connections.

Our Events

Free, relaxed, and genuinely useful — Newcastle First events bring the business community together in a way that feels natural, not forced.

What to Expect

Networking that actually works

Our events vary — some traditional networking, others more creative. The one thing they all have in common: they're completely free and genuinely enjoyable.

☕

Monthly Coffee Mornings

Our flagship free event. Relaxed, informal, and rotating around brilliant Newcastle venues each month.

● Live Now
⚽

Social Events

Football, rugby, padel, bowling, and more. The best connections happen when you're not trying too hard.

● Live Now
🎤

Speaker Sessions

Inspiring guests from across the region sharing real stories, real journeys, and real lessons learned.

● Coming Soon

A Note on Coffee

Free events, supported venues

☕ Just a heads-up: While our events are free to attend, we do ask that everyone pays for their own coffee. It's our little way of supporting the brilliant local venues who host us.

We rotate venues each month to spread the love across Newcastle's independent cafes, bars, and co-working spaces. If you'd like to host a Newcastle First event, get in touch!

Our Projects

Three pillars that form the lifeblood of what we're building — expanding across the North East.

The Three Pillars

Newcastle First is just the beginning

Alongside our networking events, we're launching three interconnected pillars that will form the lifeblood of what we're building — and expanding across the North East.

🤝

Networking

Free monthly coffee mornings and varied events in rotating Newcastle venues — building community, one connection at a time.

● Live Now
🏆

Awards

The North East High Street Heroes Awards — recognising and celebrating the businesses that make our high streets thrive.

● Coming Soon
🎙️

Podcast

A regional podcast spotlighting the stories, insights, and voices driving business forward across the North East.

● In Production
Project 1 — Live Now

🤝 Networking Events

Our core offering — free, relaxed, and genuinely useful business networking for everyone in the Newcastle area.

We host monthly coffee mornings at rotating venues across Newcastle, supporting local independent businesses as we go. We also run social events — football, bowling, padel, and more — because the best connections happen naturally.

Every business sector is welcome. Whether you're a sole trader or running a team of 50, there's a seat at the table for you.

View Events

What's included

  • ✓  Monthly free coffee mornings
  • ✓  Social sports events
  • ✓  Rotating venues across Newcastle
  • ✓  Introductions to business coaches
  • ✓  Inspiring speaker sessions
Project 2 — Coming Soon

🏆 North East High Street Heroes Awards

Shining a spotlight on the unsung heroes — the people and businesses making a real difference on our high streets and in our communities.

The High Street Heroes Awards will celebrate the independent businesses, community champions, and local legends who make Newcastle's streets vibrant, welcoming, and economically vital.

Nominations, categories, and dates to be announced. Register your interest below to be first to hear when entries open.

Register Interest

What we're celebrating:

  • 🏪  Best Independent Retailer
  • ☕  Best Local Hospitality Business
  • 🌟  Community Champion of the Year
  • 🚀  Best New Business
  • 💡  Most Innovative Business

🔔 Launching later this year. Subscribe to our newsletter to be notified the moment nominations open.

Project 3 — In Production

🎙️ The Newcastle First Podcast

A regional podcast spotlighting the stories, insights, and voices driving business forward across the North East.

We're producing a podcast that goes beyond the boardroom — real conversations with real business owners about the highs, the lows, and the lessons that shaped them.

Each episode will feature a guest from Newcastle's business community, exploring what it means to build something meaningful in the North East.

Want to be a Guest?

What to expect

  • 🎤  Long-form conversations with business leaders
  • 📖  Real stories — the wins and the setbacks
  • 🌍  North East-focused, nationally relevant
  • 📱  Available on all major podcast platforms

🎙️ Currently in production. Follow us on social media for launch announcements.

Together, these three pillars will empower Newcastle

…to fulfil its potential as the first place you come to do business in the North East.

The Ironing Man

Ironing & Laundry · Newcastle
10% Off

Fast, friendly ironing and laundry with collection and delivery. A proud co-partner of Newcastle First — supporting our local business community.

As a member you enjoy an exclusive 10% discount on all services.

NE BIC — Newcastle Workspace

Business Central & Innovation Central, Newcastle
Proud Sponsor
Free Day Pass 10% Off Meetings

Superb co-working and meeting rooms in the heart of Newcastle. Two centres — offering offices, meeting rooms, and co-working lounges for businesses of all sizes.

🏢
Free Co-Working Day Pass
A full free day in the co-working area — experience the space, the community, and the facilities with no commitment.
📅
10% Off First Meeting Room
Professional spaces for presentations, workshops, and team sessions — 10% off your first booking.
How to book

Surgotech Solutions

Technology & Business Improvement · Newcastle
Exclusive Offer

Surgotech Solutions helps businesses unlock their potential through smart technology and proven process improvement strategies. As a Newcastle First member, you get access to two exclusive deals.

Option 1 — Free
1-Hour Discovery Call
A free, no-obligation consultation to explore how Surgotech can help streamline your business operations.
Option 2 — 40% Off
Business Process Audit £895 £537
An in-depth 8-hour audit identifying inefficiencies and delivering a clear improvement roadmap for your business.

Code NCL-SURGE

Free Apps

Community Tools

Free apps to support wellbeing and employment — built with marginal gains methodology.

🧠

Emotional Wellbeing Indicator

Free App

Answer 100 simple yes/no questions to assess key wellbeing areas. When you respond negatively, the app delivers personalised, practical advice. Your unique action plan evolves with you — building lasting habits and real results, whether for self-growth or mentoring others.

100
Questions
Free
Always
iOS & Android
Platform
🍎 Download on theApp Store ▶ Get it onGoogle Play
😊 Emotional Health 🎯 Marginal Gains 📈 Progress Tracking 🤝 Mentoring Tool
💼

Preparation For Employment

Free App

Answer 100 yes/no questions to assess your employment readiness. Get personalised advice on every area you can improve. Your action plan evolves with you — and you receive a certificate of employability to present to potential employers.
